_source: Paraphrased from community tier lists, not copied verbatim: Raider King's background tier list (https://raiderking.com/battle-brothers-best-backgrounds-tier-list/) for overall S/A/B power ranking, and GamersDecide's Top 10 Backgrounds (https://www.gamersdecide.com/articles/battle-brothers-best-backgrounds) for the game-phase framing ('ideal early game', 'mid-game hires', 'mid-to-late game recruits'). Cross-checked against the base_wage / starting_level values in backgrounds.json, which line up with the phases (early picks ~5-13/day, mid ~14-25, late ~35).
_note: A background can appear in more than one phase. Names must match the keys in backgrounds.json exactly.

phases.label: Early game
phases.hint: Cheap bodies with low wages - hire several and keep the good rolls.

phases.label: Mid game
phases.hint: Better base stats for a moderate wage, once you can afford a miss.

phases.label: Late game
phases.hint: Premium hires worth the high wage - strong enough to slot straight in.
